name: Pizza Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the Canadian bacon and cut away any fat.
2. Heat tomato sauce and water in a large pot until it comes to a boil.
3. Add bacon, celery, green pepper, oregano, garlic powder, mushrooms, and black olives.
4. Cook until the vegetables are tender.
5. Stir in the cooked macaroni and simmer for a few minutes to heat everything through.
6. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed. Serve hot.
